stemHtml: Contracting States shall notify the aircraft operator when a person is found inadmissible. Does Annex 9 specify the period of time needed for deportation of an inadmissable person?

options.a: Yes, it specifies the amount of time for the State and the operator.
options.b: Yes, it specifies the amount of time for the State regardless of the operator needs.
options.c: No, the State decides for the operator.
options.d: No, the State asks the operator for a reasonable amount of time.
